step_rationale: Proinflammatory adipocytokine; promotes vascular inflammation, atherosclerosis and plaque destabilization; AMI risk factor.
mechanism: Visfatin amplifies plaque inflammation and matrix degradation, destabilizing atherosclerotic lesions and increasing rupture and thrombotic risk.
